data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for review collection through Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Review collection through Google', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The prior steps focus on booking processes and member interactions, but none specifically address the review collection functionality with Google. This indicates a gap in the necessary functionality to fulfill the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of review collection through Google.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the review collection requirement.
